---
title: "lasso_income"
format: pdf
---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(glmnet)
library(gt)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

```{r echo=FALSE}

# Data

model_inputs <- data %>% 
  filter(age > 18,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force") %>% 
  mutate(
    education = case_when(
      education == "No schooling completed" ~ "Less than High School",
      TRUE ~ education
    ),
    cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen", "Citizen", "Non-Citizen"),
    cit_simp = factor(cit_simp, levels = c("Citizen","Non-Citizen")),
    education = factor(education,
      levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                 "Doctorate degree",
                 "Master's degree",
                 "Bachelor's degree",
                 "Associate's degree",
                 "Some college",
                 "Regular high school diploma",
                 "GED or alternative credential",
                 "Less than High School")),
    log_income = log(income_personal)
  ) %>% 
  
  select(log_income, age, education, race_simp, cit_simp, pwgtp) %>%
  filter(is.finite(log_income), !is.na(pwgtp)) %>%
  mutate(
    race_simp = droplevels(factor(race_simp)),
    education = droplevels(factor(education)),
    cit_simp  = droplevels(factor(cit_simp))
  )

# Train/test split

set.seed(123)
idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(model_inputs)), size = 0.7 * nrow(model_inputs))
train <- model_inputs[idx, ]
test  <- model_inputs[-idx, ]

w_train <- train$pwgtp
w_test  <- test$pwgtp

w_rmse <- function(y, yhat, w) sqrt(weighted.mean((y - yhat)^2, w, na.rm = TRUE))
w_mae  <- function(y, yhat, w) weighted.mean(abs(y - yhat), w, na.rm = TRUE)

vars_needed <- c("log_income","age","education","race_simp","cit_simp","pwgtp")

train_cc <- train %>% filter(if_all(all_of(vars_needed), ~ !is.na(.)))
test_cc  <- test  %>% filter(if_all(all_of(vars_needed), ~ !is.na(.)))

w_train_cc <- train_cc$pwgtp
w_test_cc  <- test_cc$pwgtp

x_train <- model.matrix(log_income ~ age + education + race_simp + cit_simp, data = train_cc)[, -1]
x_test  <- model.matrix(log_income ~ age + education + race_simp + cit_simp, data = test_cc)[, -1]
y_train <- train_cc$log_income
y_test  <- test_cc$log_income

# LASSO fit + weighted evaluation

set.seed(123)
cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, weights = w_train_cc)
lasso_fit <- glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, lambda = cv_lasso$lambda.1se, weights = w_train_cc)

pred <- as.numeric(predict(lasso_fit, newx = x_test))

rmse_lasso <- w_rmse(y_test, pred, w_test_cc)
mae_lasso  <- w_mae(y_test, pred, w_test_cc)

rmse_lasso
mae_lasso
```

```{r echo=FALSE}

# Non-zero coefficients

coef_mat <- as.matrix(coef(lasso_fit))
coef_tbl <- tibble(
  term = rownames(coef_mat),
  coef = as.numeric(coef_mat[, 1])
) %>%
  filter(coef != 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coef)))

coef_tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "LASSO: Selected Coefficients (non-zero)") %>%
  fmt_number(columns = coef, decimals = 3)
```

```text
Based on the selected coefficients,education is the strongest driver.
Less than hs is about 51% lower in income than those with a post-bacc professional degree.
```

```{r echo=FALSE}

#Ridge vs Lasso Test

w_rmse <- function(y, yhat, w) sqrt(weighted.mean((y - yhat)^2, w, na.rm = TRUE))

fit_compare <- function(df, seed) {
  set.seed(seed)
  idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(df)), size = 0.7*nrow(df))
  train <- df[idx, ]
  test  <- df[-idx, ]
  
  vars <- c("log_income","age","education","race_simp","cit_simp","pwgtp")
  train <- train %>% filter(if_all(all_of(vars), ~ !is.na(.)))
  test  <- test  %>% filter(if_all(all_of(vars), ~ !is.na(.)))
  
  x_train <- model.matrix(log_income ~ age + education + race_simp + cit_simp, train)[,-1]
  x_test  <- model.matrix(log_income ~ age + education + race_simp + cit_simp, test)[,-1]
  y_train <- train$log_income; y_test <- test$log_income
  w_train <- train$pwgtp;      w_test <- test$pwgtp
  
  # LASSO
  cv_l <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha=1, weights=w_train)
  fit_l <- glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha=1, lambda=cv_l$lambda.1se, weights=w_train)
  pred_l <- as.numeric(predict(fit_l, newx=x_test))
  rmse_l <- w_rmse(y_test, pred_l, w_test)
  
  # Ridge
  cv_r <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha=0, weights=w_train)
  fit_r <- glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha=0, lambda=cv_r$lambda.1se, weights=w_train)
  pred_r <- as.numeric(predict(fit_r, newx=x_test))
  rmse_r <- w_rmse(y_test, pred_r, w_test)
  
  tibble(seed=seed, rmse_lasso=rmse_l, rmse_ridge=rmse_r)
}


results <- map_dfr(1:20, \(s) fit_compare(model_inputs, 100+s))

results %>%
  summarize(
    mean_rmse_lasso = mean(rmse_lasso),
    mean_rmse_ridge = mean(rmse_ridge),
    ridge_wins = mean(rmse_ridge < rmse_lasso)
  )

results %>%
  summarize(
    mean_rmse_lasso = mean(rmse_lasso),
    sd_rmse_lasso   = sd(rmse_lasso),
    mean_rmse_ridge = mean(rmse_ridge),
    sd_rmse_ridge   = sd(rmse_ridge),
    ridge_wins      = mean(rmse_ridge < rmse_lasso)
  )
```
